title: Fix E-key and space key capture in commons

log.context: Fix E-key and space key capture in commons

Done. Here's what was found and fixed:

**Root cause — two separate bugs, both the same class of issue:**

1. `/mnt/data/commons-client/src/input.ts` (line 50): `e.preventDefault()` was called for Space unconditionally on `window` keydown — *before* checking `isModalOpen()`, and with no check for whether a text input had focus. Space was always captured globally.

2. `/mnt/data/commons-client/src/entities/warthog.ts` (line 30): The E key handler called `e.preventDefault()` with zero focus guard ...(truncated)
